title: Instagram News
excerpt: Yay! Instagram now has their own platform for viewing photos online. My Instagram web profile is right here: http://instagram.com/amytangerine The photos on the header rotate around randomly. It's pretty neat! Find yours (or others) by simply adding their username after:…
body:
Yay! Instagram now has their own platform for viewing photos online. My Instagram web profile is right here: http://instagram.com/amytangerine

The photos on the header rotate around randomly. It's pretty neat! Find yours (or others) by simply adding their username after: http://instagram.com/
